entries.title: CLI test coverage gap — only 1 trivial test for identity commands

entries.title: display_name has no empty/whitespace validation

entries.title: use_identity vs resolve_active_identity behavioral inconsistency for anonymous IDs

entries.title: UUID v4 vs counter-based ID generation — no spec requirement for ordering
entries.target: UUID v4 is collision-safe; counter not required by spec
entries.closure_note: UUID v4 is collision-safe; counter not required by spec

entries.title: ResolvedIdentity uses raw String for identity_type instead of LocalIdentityType enum

entries.closure_note: V1.3 Wave 3: refactored to use LocalIdentityType enum

entries.title: thiserror alignment — LocalDbError uses manual Display/Error vs domain thiserror
entries.closure_note: Manual Display preserved for custom formatting; thiserror migration deferred
